typography.instruction: Use expo-font to load these Google Fonts.

iconography_and_imagery.icons: Use @expo/vector-icons. Prefer FontAwesome5 and MaterialCommunityIcons. Use mythological equivalents: Shield for defense, Lightning Bolt for power, Star for XP.
iconography_and_imagery.imagery_direction: Epic, dramatic lighting. Gold and saffron accents on deep dark backgrounds. Use subtle mandala patterns as watermark backgrounds for cards.

principles: Use React Native Animated API or react-native-reanimated for smooth transitions.
Cubic Easing: Animations should accelerate when entering and decelerate when exiting.
Feedback: Every touch MUST trigger visual feedback (scale down to 0.95 on press).
Glow pulsing: Selected heroes/weapons should have a breathing opacity animation on their gold border.

Splash_Home.layout: Centered content with epic background image.
elements: Massive game logo ('DHARMA BATTLE') in Cinzel font, Gold color with text shadow.
Pulsing 'TAP TO START' primary button.
Bottom row icons for Settings, Leaderboard, Profile.
Avatar circle with golden border.
Warrior Name (h2) and Level indicator.
XP Bar (gold fill) indicating progress to next level.
Stats grid: Total Kills, Matches Won, Favorite Astra.
Coins balance with gold coin icon.

Hero_Selection.layout: Horizontal ScrollView / Carousel for Hero cards.
elements: Screen Title: 'SELECT WARRIOR'.
Hero Cards: Portrait image, Name, Stat bars (HP, ATK, SPD), locked overlay (if not owned).
Bottom sticky area: 'SELECT' or 'UNLOCK (Cost)' button.
Screen Title: 'CHOOSE ASTRA'.
Weapon Cards: Icon, Name, Damage value, Cooldown time.
Highlight currently equipped weapon.
Map Card: Background thumbnail of map, Title (e.g., Kurukshetra), Difficulty (Skulls/Stars).
Play button overlay on selected map.

In_Game_Battle_HUD.layout: Absolute positioning over the 2D game canvas.
elements: Top-left: Player Mini Health Bar and Ammo/Mana indicator.
Top-center: Match Timer and Wave indicator.
Top-right: Kill Counter and Pause button.
Bottom-left: Virtual Joystick (transparent dark base, glowing stick).
Bottom-right: Large Fire button, smaller surrounding buttons for Astra/Special ability.

Battle_Results.layout: Centered modal style overlay with dark maroon background.
elements: Title: 'VICTORY' or 'DEFEAT' (Cinzel).
Stats breakdown: Kills, Survival Time.
Rewards section: XP gained, Coins earned (animated counting up).
Buttons: 'SHARE', 'HOME', 'PLAY AGAIN'.
Current Coin Balance sticky at top right.
Grid of items to buy.
Coin Packs: 'Handful of Coins', 'Chest of Wealth' (mock IAP buttons).
Top 3 podium display at the top.
List items: Rank number, Avatar, Name, Score/Kills.
Highlight current player's row.

Settings.layout: Vertical list of toggles and sliders.
elements: Music Volume slider.
SFX Volume slider.
Controls Sensitivity slider.
Graphics Quality toggle (Low/High).

GENERAL_UI_UX_DESIGN_GUIDELINES: No transparent backgrounds on readable text containers. Use 'rgba(26, 26, 46, 0.8)' or similar solid bases.
Add `data-testid` to all interactive and key informational elements for testing.
Optical alignment over geometrical alignment. Add extra padding where icons meet text.
Ensure touch targets are at least 44x44 points (React Native units).
Maintain contrast ratios. Text on dark backgrounds must be pure white or very light grey.
Never use generic default fonts for headings. Always enforce the custom display font (Cinzel).
Avoid standard React Native button components; always build custom TouchableOpacity buttons for stylized look.
Implement safe area boundaries (`SafeAreaView`) to prevent UI elements from hiding behind device notches.
